overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit downtown districts at dusk. The player drives through dense urban canyons lined with holographic advertisements, stops at intersections behind traffic, and passes futuristic corporate architecture including the Biotechnica building and palm-lined boulevards.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: accelerating through covered street section under overpass
approaching intersection with painted crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle at high speed through narrow urban canyon, weaving between vehicles and neon signs

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising displays with purple and blue neon colors lining the street
multi-level highway structure crossing above the street
floating digital display projecting product advertisements
tall skyscrapers with glass facades and neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-speed motorcycle driving through a narrow urban canyon bathed in neon light. Holographic advertisements and massive digital billboards line both sides of the street, reflecting off the wet asphalt. The player accelerates under elevated highway structures, approaching a crosswalk intersection in the dense commercial district.

events.description: slowing down to stop behind delivery truck at red traffic light
coming to complete stop behind truck, waiting at intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at intersection behind a delivery truck, waiting for traffic signal to change

notable_agents.action: delivery truck stopped at red light directly ahead of motorcycle

entered.detail: large commercial delivery vehicle with digital billboard on the side
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on road
suspended traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle slows and stops at a major intersection behind a delivery truck. The scene opens up from the narrow canyon to a wider crossing with visible crosswalk markings. The player waits at the red traffic light, with neon storefronts visible on the left side.

events.description: accelerating from stop and proceeding through intersection
approaching the distinctive Biotechnica corporate building with large signage

agents.ego_description: accelerating through city streets, navigating under multiple overpasses and approaching corporate district

entered.detail: massive corporate skyscraper with prominent Biotechnica signage and circular architectural elements
illuminated yellow chevron signs indicating curve in road
large electronic billboards displaying animated commercials

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates away from the intersection, driving beneath elevated highway structures. The environment transitions to reveal the massive Biotechnica corporate building dominating the skyline ahead. The player navigates through the urban canyon with digital advertisements flashing on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district with heavy neon signage and wide boulevards

events.description: making right turn around the Biotechnica building complex
slowing down for intersection with crosswalk and traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through corporate district, making turns around the Biotechnica building and following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: modern glass and steel office towers with illuminated windows
tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard
broad multi-lane street with clear lane markings

segments.scene_description: The player navigates around the Biotechnica building, making a right turn into a wider corporate boulevard. Palm trees become visible along the left side as the architecture shifts to modern glass towers. The motorcycle follows a red sports car through the neon-lit district, slowing for an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale corporate boulevard with palm tree landscaping

events.description: accelerating to high speed on open palm tree lined boulevard
approaching and crossing pedestrian crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed down the palm-lined corporate boulevard, passing through intersections

entered.detail: sleek futuristic office complexes with horizontal neon accent lighting
continuous row of illuminated palm trees along the sidewalk
pedestrian bridge crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features high-speed driving down an upscale corporate boulevard lined with illuminated palm trees. The architecture consists of sleek modern towers with horizontal neon accents. The player accelerates through the wide street, passing under an elevated pedestrian walkway and crossing marked intersections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey through a neon-drenched urban canyon that gradually opens into a sleek, palm-lined corporate boulevard. It begins with a motorcycle accelerating through narrow streets flanked by massive holographic billboards and wet asphalt, moving beneath elevated highway structures toward a dense commercial intersection. As the bike slows to a stop behind a delivery truck at a red light, the view expands to reveal a wider crossing and glowing storefronts before accelerating once more. The scene then shifts as the motorcycle passes under further overpasses to reveal the towering Biotechnica corporate building, eventually turning right away from the narrow canyons and into a district of modern glass towers. Finally, the environment transforms into an upscale boulevard where the camera speeds past illuminated palm trees and sleek architecture, gliding under a pedestrian walkway toward the heart of the corporate district.
